title: Starting Angle ( StartAngle)
text: Starting Angle ( StartAngle) Point on a circle where the meter scale begins, expressed in degrees. Values can be positive integer or floating point numbers. The default is 270 (degrees). StartAngle = " Number " Setting in ProcScript Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties = "startangle=220;sweepangle=250" Copy Figure 1. Meter Start and Sweep Angles Applies To umeter (Meter) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
